title: World of Wonders Reforged
description: Discover new structures inspired by The Twilight Forest, Create, Alex’s Caves, Biomes O’ Plenty, and Another Furniture, designed to enhance exploration and blend naturally into the world.
body:
**1.20.1 Forge requires Alex's Caves**

[Alex's Caves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves)

**1.21.1 NeoForge requires Alex's Caves (Unofficial Port)**

[Alex's Caves (Unofficial Port)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alexs-caves-unofficial-port)

**NOTE! THIS MOD REQUIRES:**

Alex's Caves or Alex's Caves (Unofficial Port)

Another Furniture

Biomes O' Plenty

Create

The Twilight Forest

**🌍 Inspired Structures**

Inspired Structures adds 7 brand-new world structures to Minecraft, each carefully designed and inspired by the style and atmosphere of popular mods like The Twilight Forest, Create, Another Furniture, Alex’s Caves, and Biomes O’ Plenty.

These structures are built to feel immersive and natural, blending seamlessly into the world while encouraging exploration and discovery. Whether you stumble upon mysterious ruins, decorative builds, or functional-looking creations, every structure tells a small story and makes the world feel more alive.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

🏗️ 7 unique new structures scattered throughout the world

🌲 Fantasy-inspired builds influenced by The Twilight Forest

⚙️ Industrial and mechanical themes inspired by Create

🪑 Cozy and decorative elements inspired by Another Furniture

🕳️ Mysterious designs inspired by Alex’s Caves

🌿 Natural integration with biomes inspired by Biomes O’ Plenty

 **📌 Notes**
 
This mod is inspired by these mods but does require them to be installed

Designed to be vanilla-friendly and compatible with most world-gen mods

Perfect for players who love exploration and want their worlds to feel richer, more detailed, and full of surprises.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)
